_comment: Default text-processing configuration for Vibetype backend. Users may place an override at ~/.config/vibetype/text-processing.json with only the fields they want to change.

filler_removal.comment: 那个/这个/然后 are NOT in the filler list and are never removed

repeat_removal.comment: Only remove adjacent repetitions explicitly listed in the CJK and English allowlists; an empty allowlist disables that category.

self_repair.comment: Only high-confidence date/number/version self-repair. e.g. 周四，不对，周五 -> 周五; 1.2，不对，1.3 -> 1.3

alias_correction.comment: Canonical alias correction with longest-match-first, word-boundary Latin, contiguous CJK

protected_spans.comment: Protected spans are never modified by any processing step
